summary: Bad commit 06b81c6692 bundles cache-lane files under TOOL-GRAPH message
detail: Commit 06b81c6692 (HEAD~1) was accidentally created during TOOL-GRAPH staging attempts. It carries the message "feat(tool): add cross-tool dependency graph" but actually contains only cache-lane files (cache-key.ts, cache-pipeline.test.ts). The actual TOOL-GRAPH files are correctly committed in 0ae5ca1fcd. 06b81c6692 should be reverted or squashed before push.
